questions.question: What library is used to encrypt bids in the browser before submitting to the contract?
The frontend can interact with the contract without copying the ABI file.
What does the 'value' field in the submitBid transaction pay for?
The ______ library provides hooks like useAccount, useChainId, and useWriteContract for wallet interactions.
When a user places a bid, where does the encryption happen?
options: Entirely in the browser using blocklock-js
questions.correctAnswer: Entirely in the browser using blocklock-js

questions.question: What happens when a winner pays cross-chain?
options: A solver sends tokens to the seller on Base from their own liquidity, then gets reimbursed on the destination chain
The winner manually bridges tokens first
The payment is delayed until both chains sync
questions.correctAnswer: A solver sends tokens to the seller on Base from their own liquidity, then gets reimbursed on the destination chain

questions.question: The onlyswaps-js SDK is required for the marketplace frontend to work.
